---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the documentation, samples, or tooling
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
What would you like to see added or improved?

## Use Case
Why is this needed, and what problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How would you implement or structure it?

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider?

## Additional Context
Include SPP version requirements, related scripts, links, or anything else relevant.
